enemies.name: Forest Guardian
enemies.description: Ancient protector spirit of the Verdance groves.

enemies.name: Shadow Stalker
enemies.description: Dark predator that hunts during Silver Sap phases.

enemies.name: Crimson Warden
enemies.description: Corrupted warrior empowered by Crimson Sap.

enemies.name: Timber Wolf
enemies.description: A common predator of the Verdance forests.

enemies.name: Thorn Sprite
enemies.description: Tiny plant spirits that swarm in groups.

enemies.name: Root Crawler
enemies.description: Insectoid burrower that ambushes from underground.

enemies.name: Sap Beetle
enemies.description: Beetle that feeds on crystallized sap.

enemies.name: Bark Spider
enemies.description: Web-spinning predator that drops from the canopy.

enemies.name: Fungal Slime
enemies.description: Gelatinous fungal mass that spreads spores.

enemies.name: Corrupted Treant
enemies.description: Once-noble tree spirit consumed by Blight.

enemies.name: Spore Crawler
enemies.description: Giant fungal crawler that debuffs with toxins.

enemies.name: Crystal Golem
enemies.description: Animated crystal construct from the old Emerald mines.

enemies.name: River Serpent
enemies.description: Aquatic predator of the Emerald Cascades.

enemies.name: Vine Wraith
enemies.description: Spectral plant spirit that entangles prey.

enemies.name: Hollow Knight
enemies.description: Fallen Bloomguard corrupted by the Hollowing.

enemies.name: Abyssal Imp
enemies.description: Lesser demon from beyond the Veil.

enemies.name: Ancient Treant
enemies.description: Massive tree guardian of the deepest groves.

enemies.name: Shadow Weaver
enemies.description: Veil-touched entity that manipulates shadows.

enemies.name: Bloodthorn Beast
enemies.description: Crimson-phase predator with thorned hide.

enemies.name: Deeproot Guardian
enemies.description: Ancient root network defender.

enemies.name: Crystal Sentinel
enemies.description: Elite crystal construct with magical abilities.

enemies.name: Sporelord Mycel
enemies.description: Boss: Sporecaller faction leader.

enemies.name: The Hollow King
enemies.description: Boss: Lord of the corrupted Hollowroot realm.

enemies.name: Abyssal Warden
enemies.description: Boss: Veil guardian twisted by the Abyss.

enemies.name: Nexus Guardian
enemies.description: Boss: Final guardian of the Nexus.

enemies.name: Sap Leech
enemies.description: Parasitic creature that drains DSP from the world when it strikes.

enemies.name: Thornback Bear
enemies.description: Massive ursine predator with thorns growing from its hide.

enemies.name: Blight Beetle Swarm
enemies.description: A chittering mass of corrupted beetles that overwhelm through numbers.

enemies.name: Corrupted Dryad
enemies.description: Once-beautiful tree spirit twisted by Blight into a vengeful caster.

enemies.name: The Blighted Oakfather
enemies.description: Boss: Ancient tree lord consumed by corruption. Act 1 final boss.

enemies.name: The Crimson Maw
enemies.description: Boss: A terrifying Abyss entity that manifests during Crimson Sap surges. The final boss.

enemies.name: Veil Wisp
enemies.description: Fragments of the Whispering Veil given weak form. They hunt during Silver Sap.

enemies.name: Rot Grub
enemies.description: Blighted larvae that swarm in Crimson phase. Weak but numerous.

enemies.name: Canopy Stalker
enemies.description: Predatory creature that hunts from the high canopy. Favors ambush.

enemies.name: Ember Sprite
enemies.description: Tiny Crimson Sap elementals. They explode when cornered.

enemies.name: Moss Golem
enemies.description: Living mound of moss and roots. Slow but nearly unbreakable.

enemies.name: Thorn Harrier
enemies.description: Flying thorn-creature that harries travelers. Common in Spindlewood.

enemies.name: Sap Ghost
enemies.description: Spirit bound to spilled Sap. Drains the living to sustain itself.

enemies.name: Blight Hound
enemies.description: Corrupted wolf-like beast. Hunts in packs near Blight zones.

enemies.name: Root Sentinel
enemies.description: Smaller kin of the great Root Sentinels. Guards sacred groves.
